[ ◇ ] Concept;

“Uhh, is this thing on? Oh! Excellent.” The blue hedgehog said with an amused laugh, adjusting himself in front of the camera with bright eyes. With a quick glance, Sonic made sure once again that the green light was on (he'd hate to find out he'd been talking to himself this whole time) and puffed out his chest, his tone slightly mischievous as he said in a whisper. “I know it's been a while, and I know you missed me... So I promise the show today will be amazing!”

The blue hedgehog could already feel the excitement running through his skin. Heh, he was ready to give it his all.
